title: Noir Celluloid
description: Ce style imite la cinématographie classique des films noirs des années 1940 et la photographie analogique vintage au gélatino-bromure d'argent. Il se caractérise par un éclairage en clair-obscur extrême, des ombres profondes, des lumières rasantes intenses créant des halos lumineux, et une faible profondeur de champ avec un bokeh circulaire prononcé. L'atmosphère est chargée de brume volumétrique et de grain de film analogique authentique, créant une esthétique monochrome sombre et contrastée.
description_en: This style emulates classic 1940s film noir cinematography and vintage silver gelatin analog photography. It is characterized by extreme chiaroscuro lighting, deep crushing shadows, intense rim lights that create luminous halos around edges, and a shallow depth of field with prominent circular bokeh. The atmosphere is thick with volumetric haze and authentic analog film grain, resulting in a moody, high-contrast monochromatic aesthetic.
description_fr: Ce style imite la cinématographie classique des films noirs des années 1940 et la photographie analogique vintage au gélatino-bromure d'argent. Il se caractérise par un éclairage en clair-obscur extrême, des ombres profondes, des lumières rasantes intenses créant des halos lumineux, et une faible profondeur de champ avec un bokeh circulaire prononcé. L'atmosphère est chargée de brume volumétrique et de grain de film analogique authentique, créant une esthétique monochrome sombre et contrastée.
prompt: Emulate 1940s film noir cinematography and vintage silver gelatin analog photography. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. Render the visual composition in a high-contrast monochromatic tonal range, utilizing {{primary_color}} for the deep, crushing macro-shadows, {{secondary_color}} for the rich, nuanced midtones, and {{accent_color}} for the intense, blown-out highlight glows. The lighting anatomy relies on extreme chiaroscuro principles, featuring a harsh, directional key light and a piercing cinematic backlight that generates a luminous rim-light halo around the outer contours of the primary elements. The spatial environment is heavily saturated with thick volumetric haze and suspended smoke, scattering the intense light sources into soft, optical blooming halations. Utilize a very shallow depth of field macro-lens effect, rendering distant background elements into heavy optical blur with massive, distinct circular bokeh orbs overlapping in the atmospheric distance. The tactile material texture must feature authentic 35mm analog film grain, subtle emulsion scratches, and smooth, continuous gradients transitioning violently from pure black voids to blinding white light. Edges of sharply focused foreground elements must slice cleanly through the atmospheric fog, while shadow-side contours melt seamlessly into the surrounding darkness. Depth is established exclusively through this extreme focal falloff and heavy atmospheric perspective.
prompt_removebg: Emulate 1940s film noir cinematography and vintage silver gelatin analog photography. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. Render the visual composition composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface, allowing intentional overflow where parts of the {{subject}} can extend beyond the visible frame. Render in a high-contrast monochromatic tonal range, utilizing {{primary_color}} for the deep, crushing macro-shadows, {{secondary_color}} for the rich, nuanced midtones, and {{accent_color}} for the intense highlight glows, all interacting seamlessly with the flat {{background_color}} backdrop. The lighting anatomy relies on extreme chiaroscuro principles, featuring a harsh, directional key light and a piercing cinematic backlight that generates a luminous rim-light halo around the outer contours of the primary elements, casting appropriate soft drop shadows onto the {{background_color}}. The spatial environment is heavily saturated with thick volumetric haze, scattering the intense light sources into soft halations. Utilize a very shallow depth of field macro-lens effect, rendering background elements into heavy optical blur with massive, distinct circular bokeh orbs. The tactile material texture must feature authentic 35mm analog film grain, subtle emulsion scratches, and continuous gradients transitioning from pure black voids to blinding white light. Edges of sharply focused foreground elements must slice cleanly through the fog, while shadow-side contours melt seamlessly into the {{background_color}}. Depth is established through focal falloff and atmospheric perspective.
background_prompt: A moody, cinematic film noir interior environment rendered in vintage silver gelatin photography style. The scene features deep, crushing shadows in {{primary_color}} and misty midtones in {{secondary_color}}, illuminated by harsh, blinding highlights in {{accent_color}}. The atmosphere is thick with suspended smoke and volumetric haze, creating glowing halations around unseen light sources. Massive, distinct circular bokeh orbs float in the heavily blurred, out-of-focus background, establishing an intense shallow depth of field. The entire spatial layout is coated in heavy 35mm analog film grain and subtle emulsion textures, creating a mysterious, high-contrast monochromatic backdrop.
background_prompt_removebg: A moody, cinematic film noir interior environment rendered in vintage silver gelatin photography style, transitioning seamlessly into a flat {{background_color}} surface. The scene features deep, crushing shadows in {{primary_color}} and misty midtones in {{secondary_color}}, illuminated by harsh highlights in {{accent_color}}. The atmosphere is thick with suspended smoke and volumetric haze, creating glowing halations. Massive circular bokeh orbs float in the out-of-focus background. In the foreground, a decorative, out-of-focus cinematic vignette of silhouetted architectural framing elements and swirling smoke wisps acts as an overlay, creating extreme depth of field before dissolving into the clean {{background_color}} backdrop. Heavy 35mm analog film grain coats the composition.
